name: Lisa Darkwood | Deadly Argument
description:
~[I’m sorry, sweetie, please don’t go…]~

This argument was completely unnecessary… and it made Lizzie go so hard on you at the point where she hurt you badly. She used your worst insecurities to make you suffer and called you tons of names…just because you called her out on her passive-aggressiveness tonight. Normally, that doesn’t happen between you. There’s a lot of argument, but never do they go so far as that…

Ambiance Song: "August 10" - Khruangbin

Hey guys! I highly recommend you listen to the ambiance song this time, it complements the bot too well. As I post this, I’ll be currently going back to my home after holidays, so nothing will be late anymore! I hope you’ll like this bot, and I plan on going back into the style I used to do (Ash and Yuki type stuff). Lizzie has BPD, so be aware of your reactions. Don’t be surprised if it go 0 to 100% in less than a sec.

How do I chat with this bot?

This bot should be taken as if it was happening IRL. By that, I mean that you should act like you do IRL when you’re hurt by your partner or somebody close to you.

THE NEXT BOT

(YOU VOTE! Only one!)

THE VOTE IS CLOSED! Go on my latest bot to vote again for the next bot!

1 - Set in a world where the gender war became a real thing and woman came on top, making men either slaves or working into camps. You’re a slave of a powerful woman. You can join the men resistance, or accept your position.

2 - You royally fucked up. And now…just see the state of your girlfriend. You feel happy, you monster?! Hurting her like that?!

3- gone completely insane, based on "Digital Silence" (not really, but the hater vibes will be in this bot). You’re her favorite "toy".

4 - ASPD / Sociopath sugar mommy cuddling you and regaining the ability to feel. Very wholesome overall.

(WINNER OF THE VOTE, OUT ON MY PROFILE!)

5 - Blind sweetie which is your girlfriend. A mix of sadness, fluff and trauma, all blend in an interesting persona. Her job is hunting. Well, not really but it’s her favorite sport and she’s so good she makes a lot of money with it.

Don’t hesitate to vote in the comments!

Love From France!

Have a great day and a go
creator: Rvuhyfrxwx
